reasoning_model_1: Model 1 attempts to convey the 'rushed rhythm' by adopting a breathless, urgent tone (00:00-00:02). model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 fails to read the complete script, omitting the opening exclamation 'Hurry!', which is a significant content error.
